Description.SourceString: It is said that Guthix created the first fortifying soup, as a gift for his chief druids. While the first few attempts created terrible food poisoning -- Guthix was a god, not a chef -- the perfected recipe soon became a favourite once he mixed in mushrooms. This was because the mushrooms absorbed much of the toxins, making it much more palatable.
Description.LocalizedString: It is said that Guthix created the first fortifying soup, as a gift for his chief druids. While the first few attempts created terrible food poisoning -- Guthix was a god, not a chef -- the perfected recipe soon became a favourite once he mixed in mushrooms. This was because the mushrooms absorbed much of the toxins, making it much more palatable.
